path: Problem: Return a spill-down list of headers/items whose corresponding flag/value matches a user-specified criterion
Action: Array-filter matching columns with IF + COLUMN, rank matches with SMALL, return header with INDEX, suppress extra rows with COUNTIFS + ROWS inside IF
Observation: When the flags are in a single row aligned to header labels, matching columns can be converted to column numbers and retrieved in order; COUNTIFS limits output to the number of matches
